name: Elaine
alt_names: Holy Maiden of the Fairy King's Forest
description: Elaine is King's sister, and the Guardian Saint of the Fountain of Youth. She has long and thin eyelashes, and cut hair that reaches her neck. She wears a single white one-piece dress which is tied together with a butterfly knot at the back. Elaine is shown to be a kind, caring and forgiving girl.
